articles.title: BJP MLA's son blames victims after ramming 5 with Thar SUV in MP: 'I was honking, why didn’t they move?'
articles.description: Police have booked MLA Pritam Lodhi’s son Dinesh Lodhi under Section 281 of the Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita for rash and negligent driving.

articles.title: ‘I was honking, why didn’t they move?’: BJP MLA’s son who rammed 5 with his Thar SUV in MP
articles.description: Dinesh Lodhi, son of Pichhore MLA Pritam Lodhi, was driving his Mahindra Thar in the Karera area.

articles.title: Man who impersonated IAS officer arrested for ₹41 lakh fraud in Bengaluru
articles.description: According to the complainant, who owns a medical store, the accused was introduced to him through a District Surgeon, and had promised to secure a medicine supply order worth ₹1.8 crore for Primary Health Centres.

articles.title: Congress MLA Vinay Kulkarni sentenced to life imprisonment for murdering BJP leader in Dharwad in 2016
articles.description: Vinay Kulkarni, elected to the Legislative Assembly from the Dharwad constituency, was named as prime accused in the murder of Yogeshgouda Goudar, a 26-year-old BJP zilla panchayat member, in Dharwad in 2016

articles.title: Living with the Mughals: a legacy that endures despite erasure
articles.description: April 21, 2026 marks five centuries since the decisive Battle of Panipat which led to the founding of the Mughal empire in the Indian subcontinent. Memory, monument and everyday language carry forward a contested inheritance that refuses to fade

articles.title: Women-led drone patrols to secure MMTS trains
Govt. wants to change India’s electoral map, Opposition will defeat the Bill, says Rahul
articles.description: Rahul Gandhi says Constitution Amendment Bill is “nothing short of an anti-national act” and said the Opposition is going to defeat the attempt to “attack the nation state”

articles.title: What is the Number 16 riddle that Rahul Gandhi referred to in Parliament?
articles.description: What is the Number  riddle that Rahul Gandhi referred to in Parliament

topStories.title: Congress MLA Vinay Kulkarni sentenced to life imprisonment for murdering BJP leader in Dharwad in 2016
topStories.description: Vinay Kulkarni, elected to the Legislative Assembly from the Dharwad constituency, was named as prime accused in the murder of Yogeshgouda Goudar, a 26-year-old BJP zilla panchayat member, in Dharwad in 2016

topStories.title: What we know about the Israel-Lebanon ceasefire
topStories.description: US President Donald Trump announced the 10-day ceasefire between the two countries.

topStories.title: Delimitation row: BJP vs Congress over Revanth Reddy’s hybrid model
topStories.description: The model, put forward by Revanth Reddy, seeks to balance population-based representation with economic performance indicators such as Gross State Domestic Product (GSDP).

topStories.title: ‘Closely following situation in West Asia ', says MEA on Pak's role in ceasefire
topStories.description: In a weekly media briefing, Jaiswal was responding to a question on Pakistan's role in ensuring the US–Iran ceasefire.

topStories.title: Supreme Court rejects Pawan Khera's plea to extend transit bail, asks Assam Court to decide case independently
topStories.description: The SC also clarified that neither the High Court order which granted Khera relief not the apex court order which stayed the relief shall come in the way of a court in Assam which would hear and decide the matter

topStories.title: BBC in Iran: 'Tehran does not think it has lost this war'
topStories.description: Lyse Doucet says Iranians want a solution to the long-running animosity with the US, but leaders is not willing to make a deal on Washington's terms.

topStories.title: US-Iran war impact: West Asia may take up to 2 years to restore lost energy production, says IEA
topStories.description: Energy production in West Asia may take two years to recover post-conflict, varying by country, according to the IEA. The US and UK are discussing maritime security in the Strait of Hormuz, while a ceasefire with Iran may expire on April 22.

topStories.title: PM Modi's appeal for vote on women's quota amid questions over delimitation link
topStories.description: Congress-led Opposition has said a biased delimitation law is being pushed through while using the women quota as smokescreen.

topStories.title: Quote of the Day by Maya Angelou: 'I don't trust people who don't love themselves and tell me ‘I love you’…'
topStories.description: Maya Angelou was a prolific American writer and civil rights activist, known for her seven autobiographies and powerful poetry.

topStories.title: ‘Hungry all the time’: Families sound alarm as US troops are served ‘dry patty, tasteless food’ on their way to Mideast
topStories.description: A picture of a dinner on the USS Abraham Lincoln, shared by a service member with his family - consisted of a small handful of boiled carrots, a dry meat patty and a gray slab of processed meat

topStories.title: 10-day Israel-Lebanon ceasefire takes effect after intense fight — all you need to know about truce
topStories.description: A 10-day truce holds in Lebanon, pausing Israel-Hezbollah fighting and easing tensions for a potential Iran-U.S.-Israel deal. Residents celebrate, but uncertainty remains over Israel's military actions and Hezbollah's recognition of the deal.

topStories.title: Hezbollah warns fingers remain on trigger, but Lebanon ceasefire holds
topStories.description: President Trump voices renewed optimism for a wider deal to end the Iran war as Hezbollah indicates it will abide by the Israel-Lebanon ceasefire.

dailyNews.description: A 10-day truce holds in Lebanon, pausing Israel-Hezbollah fighting and easing tensions for a potential Iran-U.S.-Israel deal. Residents celebrate, but uncertainty remains over Israel's military actions and Hezbollah's recognition of the deal.

dailyNews.title: Hezbollah warns fingers remain on trigger, but Lebanon ceasefire holds
dailyNews.description: President Trump voices renewed optimism for a wider deal to end the Iran war as Hezbollah indicates it will abide by the Israel-Lebanon ceasefire.

dailyNews.title: Airline adding triple-decker bunk beds in economy-class for long-haul flights
dailyNews.description: Air New Zealand will soon offer four-hour stints in triple-decker bunk beds for long-haul flights. The carrier says they'll be the first lie-flat beds for budget air travelers.

dailyNews.title: Remains found in car ID'd as family who mysteriously vanished in 1958
dailyNews.description: The Ford station wagon thought to belong to the Martin family was found in 2024 by a diver who had been looking for it for several years.

dailyNews.title: Controversial surveillance program extended by House but only until April 30
dailyNews.description: The House OK'd a short-term renewal of a controversial surveillance program used by U.S. spy agencies, after Republicans revolted and refused President Trump's push for a longer extension.

dailyNews.title: AI "agents" can do your shopping. Should you let them?
dailyNews.description: Big retailers are embracing agentic commerce as a new way to shop. But you should think twice before handing over your credit card, tech experts say.

dailyNews.title: Israel-Lebanon ceasefire begins
dailyNews.description: The leaders of Lebanon and Israel agreed to start a 10-day truce at 5 p.m. Eastern Time Thursday.

dailyNews.title: "Irving" the sea lion wanders into San Francisco's Outer Sunset neighborhood
dailyNews.description: A sea lion turned heads in San Francisco's Outer Sunset after wandering out of the ocean and onto a neighborhood street.

dailyNews.title: Singer d4vd arrested on suspicion of murder in death of Celeste Rivas, LAPD says
dailyNews.description: Singer and songwriter d4vd has been arrested on suspicion of murder for the death of a 14-year-old whose dismembered body was found last year in a Tesla belonging to the singer.

dailyNews.title: Democrat Analilia Mejia projected to win N.J. House District 11 seat
dailyNews.description: CBS News projects that Democrat Analilia Mejia will win the special election in New Jersey's 11th Congressional District, a seat formerly held by Gov. Mikie Sherrill.

dailyNews.title: U.S. intelligence detects signs China is weighing giving Iran advance radar systems
dailyNews.description: The technology would enhance Iran's ability to detect and track incoming threats, like low-flying drones and cruise missiles.

dailyNews.title: ICE head Todd Lyons planning to leave agency this spring
dailyNews.description: Todd Lyons, the acting head of U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement, is planning to leave the federal government later this spring.

dailyNews.title: Experts, reporters on what to know about the Strait of Hormuz and Iran war | Special Report
dailyNews.description: Lindsey Reiser anchors a special CBS News 24/7 report on the blockade against Iranian ports, the effective closure of the Strait of Hormuz and the current state of the war with Iran.

dailyNews.title: Americans on Iran war's economic impact: "We're trying to stay afloat"
dailyNews.description: CBS News' Lana Zak spoke with some Americans about their thoughts on the conflict with Iran and its impact on the economy.

topStories.title: What we know about the Israel-Lebanon ceasefire
topStories.description: US President Donald Trump announced the 10-day ceasefire between the two countries.

topStories.description: President Trump voices renewed optimism for a wider deal to end the Iran war as Hezbollah indicates it will abide by the Israel-Lebanon ceasefire.

topStories.description: The House OK'd a short-term renewal of a controversial surveillance program used by U.S. spy agencies, after Republicans revolted and refused President Trump's push for a longer extension.

topStories.title: Where Trump's goals in Iran stand at this point
topStories.description: President Trump has repeatedly claimed that the war with Iran is "almost over." He has also stated multiple times that the U.S. is close to accomplishing "all of its goals" in Iran. CBS News' Robert Costa reports and Michael Doran, director of the Center for Peace and Security in the Middle East at the Hudson Institute, have more.

topStories.title: Trump continues feud with Pope Leo over war with Iran
topStories.description: Earlier this week, President Trump turned his criticism toward an unlikely subject- Pope Leo. Michael O'Loughlin, the executive editor of the National Catholic Reporter, joins "The Daily Report."

topStories.title: Lebanon Cease-Fire Leaves Netanyahu in an Uncomfortable Spot
topStories.description: Most Israelis wanted the fight against Hezbollah to continue. But Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu’s critics say he is showing that he cannot, or will not, stand up to President Trump.

topStories.title: The 27-Year-Old Diplomat Waging Trump’s Cultural War With Europe
topStories.description: Five years out of college, Samuel Samson has driven the Trump administration’s push to upend America’s postwar relationship with Europe.

topStories.title: Trump Tries to Stop Drug Smuggling From South America. Drug Smugglers Invent New Tactics.
topStories.description: Authorities are using drones, troops and A.I. to crack down on cocaine smuggling. But gangs are finding new ways to move record amounts of drugs across the world.

topStories.title: Trump to Pick Ousted FEMA Head to Lead Agency Again
topStories.description: Cameron Hamilton is a former Navy SEAL who ran unsuccessfully for Congress.

topStories.title: Trump announces ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon
topStories.description: The ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon could be a major step toward a peace deal for Iran and the US. President Trump says US talks with Iran could restart this weekend, and he’s confident they are close to a deal. NBC News’ Richard Engel has the story.

topStories.title: Trump participates in 'No Tax on Tips' roundtable
topStories.description: Watch live as President Trump participates in a roundtable on his "No Tax on Tips" initiative.

topStories.title: Trump taps former deputy surgeon general to helm CDC
topStories.description: President Trump announced former deputy surgeon general Dr. Erica Schwartz as his nominee for Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) director.

dailyNews.title: GREGG JARRETT: Long-hidden documents reveal first Trump impeachment was a total fraud
dailyNews.description: Newly declassified documents show the first Trump impeachment was orchestrated fraud, DNI Tulsi Gabbard says, sending criminal referrals to the DOJ.

dailyNews.title: Greenland talks on ‘good trajectory,’ White House says amid Trump takeover push
dailyNews.description: U.S. officials say negotiations with Denmark and Greenland are moving in a positive direction, even as tensions remain over Trump’s push for greater U.S. control of the strategic Arctic island.

dailyNews.title: House punts Trump spy powers extension after conservatives block deal, forcing end-of-month showdown
dailyNews.description: The FISA Section 702 surveillance program hit a temporary roadblock after House conservatives rejected a long-term extension early Friday morning.

dailyNews.title: Oil falls as Trump reiterates Iran war ‘should’ end soon and Israel-Lebanon truce lifts hopes
dailyNews.description: Oil prices fell after Donald Trump said Israel and Lebanon had agreed to a 10-day ceasefire following talks in Washington.

dailyNews.title: Tanker diplomacy: Trump faces tests from Havana to Hormuz
dailyNews.description: From Cuba to the Persian Gulf, Trump is expected to face fresh challenges across a new arc of tanker diplomacy.

dailyNews.title: Trump nominates Erica Schwartz as CDC director amid turmoil around leadership, vaccine policy
dailyNews.description: The CDC has been going through turmoil and several leadership shakeups under HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr.

dailyNews.title: Vance's Iran and Orbán setbacks raise questions about his standing with Trump
dailyNews.description: Recent staffing moves among JD Vance's aides have fueled new speculation that the VP and his allies are preparing for a 2028 presidential bid.

dailyNews.title: Trump says gas prices 'not very high' as most U.S. voters blame him for price spike
dailyNews.description: Trump touted the rising stock market as he brushed off concerns that Americans are laboring under higher gas prices as a result of the Iran war.

dailyNews.title: Spain touts energy resilience to Iran war as Trump tensions cast shadow over trade
dailyNews.description: The southern European country has ramped up its investment in solar and wind technologies in recent years.

dailyNews.title: WATCH:  Israel and Lebanon agree to 10-day ceasefire, President Trump says
dailyNews.description: Israel and Lebanon have agreed to a 10-day ceasefire beginning April 16, President Trump announced in a post on social media.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.
